summary: For row-wise L2 norm on large float32 rows, allocating three full-length calc buffers plus input/output queues exceeded a safe UB budget and caused vector-core runtime faults. Fix by reusing the square buffer for the reduced scalar and broadcast denominator so calcBuf stays at 2 * colCount.

summary: After ReduceSum in AscendC, directly reading the scalar result and chaining SetValue/Sqrt/Duplicate without explicit V_S and S_V synchronization can trigger MPU/vector-core faults. Follow the instance_norm pattern: add PipeBarrier plus SetFlag/WaitFlag around vector-to-scalar and scalar-to-vector transitions.

summary: In this toolchain, event constants for SetFlag/WaitFlag use bare EVENT_ID0 rather than AscendC::EVENT_ID0. If synchronization code fails to compile with 'no member named EVENT_ID0 in namespace AscendC', remove the AscendC:: qualifier.
